**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead.

**To reproduce**
Steps, plus the relevant (redacted) config snippet — trigger/network/personality
block. Never paste real tokens or passwords.

**Environment**
- annoybots version / image tag (e.g. `v1.0.2`, `:latest`):
- Platform(s): IRC / Twitch / Discord
- Deploy: local (`make run`) / Kubernetes / other

**Logs**
Relevant log lines (redact secrets).
